title: DarkMobs
description: Increases difficulty of mobs making them harder to kill and making it a challenge
body:
Get a server today and play with your friends! Click HERE or below banner & Use Code GAMERPOTION to get 25 off!


 

DarkMobs


Increases mob difficulty giving a better challenge in modded environments. Get that 'Dark Souls' effect now! |  View Changelog

Server side is supported. You can install this on the server and not need to have it installed on the client.

Created by the same authors who made DarkRPG (for a full RPG experience, get the DarkRPG modpack and enjoy quests and rpg gameplay)

 

Features

(Your vanilla experience will be further enhanced thanks to these features)

Vanilla mobs can get really easy to defeat, especially in a modded environment where players have equipment and weapons superior to vanilla stats. This mod changes mobs difficulty by making them harder to kill. Each mob has been fine-tuned to feel different based on on-going player feedback. This will make each fight exciting similar to games like Dark Souls where you have to plan each mob fight.

Pehkui is recommended if you want to make the Ender Dragon fight harder (other mobs will work without it).

 

Some Examples:-

(Dont mess with Polar Bears!)

 

Permission - Feel free to use in your modpacks.

 

Click the banner below to get your server today! or go to BisectHosting.com  and make sure to use the code 'gamerpotion' to get your 25% off.
